metadata.name: Optimize Coverage by Adjusting Antenna Tilt

description: To reduce interference with a neighboring cell, an agent needs to remotely adjust the electrical tilt of a cell tower antenna.

nodes.task_description: Identify the correct antenna and retrieve its current tilt settings.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the antenna's current tilt is 4 degrees.

nodes.task_description: Execute the command to change the electrical tilt to 2 degrees.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully sends the command to adjust the tilt.

nodes.task_description: Verify that the new tilt setting has been applied successfully.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent queries the antenna again and confirms the new tilt is 2 degrees.
